---
title: Exploring CHETAH to classify Medulloblastoma samples
date: 2024-07-22
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
execute:
  eval: false
---

# Goal of this analysis

1. Reclassify confident UBC results from CHETAH

# Files and directories

## Input

CCA RL file is found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240618/rl_cca.qs`

Tumour file is found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/icheong/CBL_scRNAseq/results/tumour/Vladoiu/20230510/mb_mnn.rds`

## Output

The output can be found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/chetah_tumour`

# Process and Results

Using the `scrnaseq_env` conda environment

Lets load in the required libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)
library(qs)
library(CHETAH)
```

```{r}
set.seed(1)
out_directory <- "/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/chetah_tumour"
if (!dir.exists(out_directory)) {
  dir.create(out_directory, recursive = TRUE)
}
```

```{r}
rl_srat <- qread("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240618/rl_cca.qs")
tumour_srat <- readRDS("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/icheong/CBL_scRNAseq/results/tumour/Vladoiu/20230510/mb_mnn.rds")
```

```{r}
# Subset out mice cells
rl_srat <- subset(x = rl_srat, subset = species == "human")
```

Take row sums for each gene in count matrix, keep genes expressed in 1% or more of cells
```{r}
# Get counts slot from Seurat object
counts_rl <- GetAssayData(object = rl_srat, slot = "counts")
counts_tumour <- GetAssayData(object = tumour_srat, slot = "counts")

# If a count for a gene in a cell is greater than 0, set as TRUE (= 1)
nonzero_rl <- counts_rl > 0
nonzero_tumour <- counts_tumour > 0

# If 1% or more cells are TRUE, keep the gene. Each TRUE value = 1. Taking the sum of all the cells for that gene
keep_rl_genes <- Matrix::rowSums(nonzero_rl) >= (0.01*length(Cells(rl_srat)))
keep_tumour_genes <- Matrix::rowSums(nonzero_tumour) >= (0.01*length(Cells(tumour_srat)))

# Get the genes names that we are keeping
rl_genes <- rownames(rl_srat)[keep_rl_genes]
tumour_genes <- rownames(tumour_srat)[keep_tumour_genes]
```

Take intersecting genes between the datasets
```{r}
intersecting_genes <- intersect(rl_genes, tumour_genes)  
```

```{r}
> print(length(rownames(rl_srat)))
[1] 52672

> print(length(rownames(tumour_srat)))
[1] 21624

> print(length(rl_genes))
[1] 15128

> print(length(tumour_genes))
[1] 13370

> print(length(intersecting_genes))
[1] 11077
```

Filter each dataset for intersecting genes
```{r}
rl_srat <- subset(rl_srat, features = intersecting_genes)
tumour_srat <- subset(tumour_srat, features = intersecting_genes)
```

Normalize, then converting Seurat object to SCE object
```{r}
# Normalize RNA assay before converting
rl_srat <- NormalizeData(rl_srat, assay = "RNA")
tumour_srat  <- NormalizeData(tumour_srat, assay = "RNA")

# Convert to SCE object
rl_sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(rl_srat)
tumour_sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(tumour_srat)
```

Running the CHETAH classifier
```{r}
input <- CHETAHclassifier(input = tumour_sce, 
                          ref_cells = rl_sce, 
                          input_c = "logcounts",
                          ref_c = "logcounts",
                          ref_ct = "broad_cell_type",
                          subsample = TRUE,
                          print_steps = TRUE)
## Plot the classification
plt <- PlotTree(input)
ggsave(filename = "chetah_classification_tree.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
## Extract celltypes:
celltypes <- input$celltype_CHETAH
```

![Initial classification tree](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/chetah_tumour/chetah_classification_tree.png)

Lets add the labels back to the tumour object
```{r}
tumour_srat@meta.data$pred_label <- celltypes
```

```{r}
table(tumour_srat@meta.data$pred_label)

        endothelial                  GC                 GCP               Node1 
                  6                1308                5039                 175 
              Node2               Node3               Node4 oligodendrocyte/OPC 
                405                 333                5096                 284 
                 RL                 UBC          Unassigned 
                380               14705                   4 
```

Lets take a look at what the predicted labels looks like
```{r}
plt <- DimPlot(tumour_srat, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, group.by = "pred_label")
ggsave(filename = "tumour_pred_labels_umap.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Tumour predicted labels](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/chetah_tumour/tumour_pred_labels_umap.png)

```{r}
source("/u/llau/software/mb_scrnaseq/MB_scRNAseq/software/utilities/cluster_barplot.R")

subtype_bar_plot <- cluster_barplot(tumour_srat, split.by = "pred_label", group.by = "subtype")
bar_plot_name <- "cell_type_subtype_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = subtype_bar_plot, path = out_directory, 
          width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)

subtype_bar_plot <- cluster_barplot(tumour_srat, split.by = "pred_label", group.by = "subtype", position = "fill")
bar_plot_name <- "cell_type_subtype_proportion_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = subtype_bar_plot, path = out_directory, 
          width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Tumour proportion by subtype](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/chetah_tumour/cell_type_subtype_proportion_bar_plot.png)

```{r}
# Reclassifying the cells at a higher confidence
reclassify <- Classify(input, thresh = 0.5)
## Extract celltypes:
celltypes <- reclassify$celltype_CHETAH
```

Lets add the labels back to the tumour object
```{r}
tumour_srat@meta.data$pred_label_0.5 <- celltypes
```

```{r}
table(tumour_srat@meta.data$pred_label_0.5)

                 GC                 GCP               Node1               Node2 
                  3                 559                6885                 136 
              Node3               Node4 oligodendrocyte/OPC                 UBC 
                395                8206                  31                5870 
         Unassigned 
               5650 
```

Lets take a look at what the predicted labels looks like
```{r}
plt <- DimPlot(tumour_srat, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, group.by = "pred_label_0.5")
ggsave(filename = "0.5_confidence_tumour_pred_labels_umap.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Tumour predicted labels at 0.5 confidence](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/chetah_tumour/0.5_confidence_tumour_pred_labels_umap.png)

```{r}
subtype_bar_plot <- cluster_barplot(tumour_srat, split.by = "pred_label_0.5", group.by = "subtype")
bar_plot_name <- "0.5_confidence_cell_type_subtype_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = subtype_bar_plot, path = out_directory, 
          width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)

subtype_bar_plot <- cluster_barplot(tumour_srat, split.by = "pred_label_0.5", group.by = "subtype", position = "fill")
bar_plot_name <- "0.5_confidence_cell_type_subtype_proportion_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = subtype_bar_plot, path = out_directory, 
          width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Tumour proportion by subtype at 0.5 confidence](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/chetah_tumour/0.5_confidence_cell_type_subtype_proportion_bar_plot.png)

Lets subset the highly confident UBC tumour cells
```{r}
tumour_subset <- subset(x = tumour_srat, subset = pred_label_0.5 == "UBC")
ubc_srat <- qread("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240527/ubc_subset.qs")
```

Converting Seurat object to SCE object
```{r}
# Subset out mice cells
ubc_srat <- subset(x = ubc_srat, subset = species == "human")
ubc_srat$cluster <- paste0("UBC_", ubc_srat$snn_res.0.3) 
ubc_srat$cluster <- factor(ubc_srat$cluster, levels = unique(ubc_srat$cluster))
DefaultAssay(ubc_srat) <- "RNA"
```

Take row sums for each gene in count matrix, keep genes expressed in 1% or more of cells
```{r}
# Get counts slot from Seurat object
counts_ubc <- GetAssayData(object = ubc_srat, slot = "counts")
counts_tumour_subset <- GetAssayData(object = tumour_subset, slot = "counts")

# If a count for a gene in a cell is greater than 0, set as TRUE (= 1)
nonzero_ubc <- counts_ubc > 0
nonzero_tumour_subset <- counts_tumour_subset > 0

# If 1% or more cells are TRUE, keep the gene. Each TRUE value = 1. Taking the sum of all the cells for that gene
keep_ubc_genes <- Matrix::rowSums(nonzero_ubc) >= (0.01*length(Cells(ubc_srat)))
keep_tumour_subset_genes <- Matrix::rowSums(nonzero_tumour_subset) >= (0.01*length(Cells(tumour_subset)))

# Get the genes names that we are keeping
ubc_genes <- rownames(ubc_srat)[keep_ubc_genes]
tumour_subset_genes <- rownames(tumour_subset)[keep_tumour_subset_genes]
```

Take intersecting genes between the datasets
```{r}
intersecting_genes <- intersect(ubc_genes, tumour_subset_genes)  
```

```{r}
> print(length(rownames(ubc_srat)))
[1] 52672

> print(length(rownames(tumour_subset)))
[1] 11077

> print(length(ubc_genes))
[1] 12344

> print(length(tumour_subset_genes))
[1] 10773

> print(length(intersecting_genes))
[1] 9416
```

Filter each dataset for intersecting genes
```{r}
ubc_srat <- subset(ubc_srat, features = intersecting_genes)
tumour_subset <- subset(tumour_subset, features = intersecting_genes)
```

```{r}
# Normalize RNA assay before converting
ubc_srat <- NormalizeData(ubc_srat, assay = "RNA")
tumour_subset  <- NormalizeData(tumour_subset, assay = "RNA")

ubc_sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(ubc_srat)
tumour_subset_sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(tumour_subset)
```

```{r}
subset_predict <- CHETAHclassifier(input = tumour_subset_sce, 
                          ref_cells = ubc_sce, 
                          ref_ct = "cluster",
                          input_c = "logcounts",
                          ref_c = "logcounts",
                          print_steps = TRUE)
## Plot the classification
plt <- PlotTree(subset_predict)
ggsave(filename = "subset_chetah_classification_tree.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
## Extract celltypes:
celltypes <- subset_predict$celltype_CHETAH
```

![UBC predicted reclassification classification tree](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/chetah_tumour/subset_chetah_classification_tree.png)

```{r}
table(celltypes)

Node1 Node2 UBC_0 UBC_1 UBC_4 
   39     1     1  5828     1 
```

```{r}
tumour_srat@meta.data$pred_label_ubc <- NA
tumour_srat@meta.data$pred_label_ubc[match(names(celltypes), rownames(tumour_srat@meta.data))] <- celltypes
tumour_srat@meta.data$pred_label_ubc <- paste0("Reclass_", tumour_srat@meta.data$pred_label_ubc)

table(tumour_srat@meta.data$pred_label_ubc)
```

```{r}
subtype_bar_plot <- cluster_barplot(tumour_srat, split.by = "pred_label_ubc", group.by = "subtype")
bar_plot_name <- "pred_label_ubc_cell_type_subtype_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = subtype_bar_plot, path = out_directory, 
          width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)

subtype_bar_plot <- cluster_barplot(tumour_srat, split.by = "pred_label_ubc", group.by = "subtype", position = "fill")
bar_plot_name <- "pred_label_ubc_cell_type_subtype_proportion_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = subtype_bar_plot, path = out_directory, 
          width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Tumour proportion of UBC subgroups split by subtype](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/chetah_tumour/pred_label_ubc_cell_type_subtype_proportion_bar_plot.png)

```{r}
tumour_srat@meta.data <- tumour_srat@meta.data %>% 
  mutate(
    # timepoints from human datasets
    pred_label_combined = case_when(
      pred_label_ubc == "Reclass_NA" ~ pred_label,
      TRUE ~ pred_label_ubc
    )
  )
```
```{r}
table(tumour_srat$pred_label_combined)

        endothelial                  GC                 GCP               Node1 
                  6                1308                5039                 175 
              Node2               Node3               Node4 oligodendrocyte/OPC 
                405                 333                5096                 284 
      Reclass_Node1       Reclass_Node2       Reclass_UBC_0       Reclass_UBC_1 
                 39                   1                   1                5828 
      Reclass_UBC_4                  RL                 UBC          Unassigned 
                  1                 380                8835                   4 
```

Lets take a look at what the combined labels looks like
```{r}
plt <- DimPlot(tumour_srat, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, group.by = "pred_label_combined")
ggsave(filename = "tumour_pred_label_combined_umap.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Tumour predicted labels with UBC subclusters](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/chetah_tumour/tumour_pred_label_combined_umap.png)

```{r}
subtype_bar_plot <- cluster_barplot(tumour_srat, split.by = "pred_label_combined", group.by = "subtype")
bar_plot_name <- "pred_label_combined_cell_type_subtype_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = subtype_bar_plot, path = out_directory, 
          width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)

subtype_bar_plot <- cluster_barplot(tumour_srat, split.by = "pred_label_combined", group.by = "subtype", position = "fill")
bar_plot_name <- "pred_label_combined_cell_type_subtype_proportion_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = subtype_bar_plot, path = out_directory, 
          width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Tumour proportion of broad cell lineages and UBC subgroups split by subtype](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/chetah_tumour/pred_label_combined_cell_type_subtype_proportion_bar_plot.png)
